# Increase Volume – Sound Boost

> Make any audio or video louder on iPhone. Boost volume up to 10x while enhancing clarity, depth, and bass for music, videos, podcasts, and voice notes.

## Main sections
- [Home](https://volumeboosting.com/): App overview, use cases, and download
- [FAQ](https://volumeboosting.com/#geo-faq-heading): Common questions and direct answers
- [Localized pages](https://volumeboosting.com/): Language-specific landing pages

## Key facts
- Product type: iPhone app for boosting quiet audio/video files
- App Store: https://apps.apple.com/app/id6741472421 (id 6741472421)
- Max boost claim: up to ~10x
- Core flow: import -> boost -> save
- Supported page languages: 15
- Software version: —
- Last build date: 2026-04-26
